meta.title: FreeCapT - the free cap table for founders and small businesses

hero.lede: Built for bootstrapped startups, family businesses, agencies, and small SaaS. In five languages. Under your country's rules. AI-native. $15/month when you want to share with stakeholders.

valueProps.heading: Cap tables shouldn't take a lawyer, a sales call, or a Tuesday.

cards.title: Free for your personal cap table
cards.body: Build it, see it, model rounds, export the raw data. No stakeholder count limits. No credit card. No asterisks. Pay $15/month only when you want to share with employees, generate legal docs, or use AI features.

cards.title: Built for seven jurisdictions
cards.body: Danish ApS · Norwegian AS · Swedish AB · German GmbH · Swiss AG · UK Ltd. · US Delaware C-Corp + LLC. Each with its own instruments, templates, and tax-favorable schemes (EMI, § 7P, opsjonsskatteordningen, QESO, ISO, profits interests).

cards.title: AI-native, not bolted-on
cards.body: Upload your formation docs - AI extracts your cap table in 90 seconds. Ask in plain English: "What if I raise 2M at 8M pre-money?" Click "explain this" on any number. Powered by Claude, in your region.

countries.heading: Free in your country, under your country's rules.
countries.lede: Every pack ships with the local entity types, instruments, validation, and document templates. No US-first hand-waving.
countries.languagesNote: UI available in Dansk · Norsk · Svenska · Deutsch · English. Language is independent of jurisdiction - pick what works for you.

product.heading: Six screens. Not thirty.
product.lede: FreeCapT is built around one question: who owns this company? Everything else is in service of answering that, clearly, in 15 minutes or less.

screens.title: Who owns this company today.
screens.body: Donut chart and table side by side. Outstanding or fully-diluted toggle. As-of-date for historical views. Click "You have 18.5% left to grant" to issue equity.

screens.title: Everyone, added in 30 seconds.
screens.body: Paste from spreadsheet. Or type in plain English: "Anna and Ben at 30% each, Dana has 200k options vested over 4 years." AI parses, you confirm.

screens.title: Allocate your raise across real investors.
screens.body: Raising 2M at 8M pre? Drop in your 10 interested investors with their commitment amounts. See who fits, who scales back, what the cap table looks like after.

screens.title: Your team sees what they own, in plain English.
screens.body: Magic-link sign-in (no passwords). Their vesting schedule. AI "explain my grant" button. Angels and advisors with multiple grants get a free portfolio dashboard.

screens.title: Per-jurisdiction templates that lawyers respect.
screens.body: Generate your Danish ejerbog, your German Gesellschafterliste, your UK Register of Members, your US capitalization table for 409A. PDF/A archival format. Word for redlining.

screens.title: "What if I raise 2M at 8M post?"
screens.body: Side-by-side before/after cap tables with per-stakeholder dilution. SAFEs auto-convert. Save scenarios, share read-only links with your cofounders.

pricing.heading: Two plans. One price.
pricing.lede: $15/month - and only when you're ready. The free plan is a real, complete cap table, not a trial.
pricing.freeTagline: For your personal cap table. Forever.
pricing.paidTagline: Everything in Free, plus the value moments.
paidFeatures: Ongoing AI chat - "ask your cap table"
Rich Excel export - multi-sheet, live formulas, embedded chart
Legal-grade PDF + Word exports - per jurisdiction
Stakeholder portal access for your team
pricing.footnote: No usage cliffs. No per-stakeholder fees. Cancel in one click; your data stays yours.

security.heading: A cap table is the most sensitive document a private company owns.

cards.title: GDPR-compliant. EU and US regions.
cards.body: EU customers' data hosted in Frankfurt; US customers in us-east. Your choice at company creation, immutable thereafter.

cards.title: AES-256 encrypted. TLS 1.3.
cards.body: Per-tenant encryption keys. SOC 2 Type I attestation in progress (target Q3 2026). ISO 27001 on the roadmap.

cards.title: Append-only audit log.
cards.body: Every state change recorded with actor, IP, before/after. 7-year retention. Tamper-evident replication to immutable storage.

cards.title: Your data is yours.
cards.body: One-click export of everything - ledger, documents, audit log - as a ZIP. Account deletion within 30 days, full purge under GDPR.

cards.title: Magic-link only. No passwords.
cards.body: Lower attack surface than password databases. Optional TOTP 2FA for the paranoid. Device-trust prompts on new sign-ins.

cards.title: Bug bounty + public security page.
cards.body: Researchers welcome. Status page at freecapt.com/status. Public changelog with every release.

items.a: Yes. The free plan is the full personal cap table - build it, see it, model rounds, export the data, switch between companies if you manage multiple. There are no stakeholder limits, no time limits, no credit card. You pay $15/month only when you want to share with stakeholders, use AI features beyond setup, or generate legal-grade documents.

Seven at launch: Denmark (ApS + A/S), Norway (AS + ASA), Sweden (AB privat + publikt), Germany (GmbH + AG), Switzerland (AG + GmbH), United Kingdom (Ltd.), and United States Delaware (C-Corp + LLC). Each comes with the local instrument types, validation rules, document templates, and tax-favorable schemes (EMI, § 7P, opsjonsskatteordningen, QESO, ISO, profits interests). More countries are sprint-sized additions.

items.q: Do I need a lawyer to use FreeCapT?
items.a: No. FreeCapT is built for founders who don't have a Cooley partner on speed-dial. Onboarding is conversational. Defaults are sensible. The AI explains anything in plain English. You'll still want a lawyer for actual fundraises, tax-scheme elections, and notary appointments - we make those moments cheaper and faster by generating the right document for your lawyer to review.

items.q: How is this different from Carta?
items.a: Carta is built for venture-backed US scaleups and prices accordingly. It's the right tool for that audience. FreeCapT is built for the rest of us - bootstrapped founders, family businesses, agencies, small SaaS. We have first-class support for the local jurisdictions most tools ignore, AI-native UX, and a free plan that's actually usable. See our full comparison pages for the detail.

A cap table is the most sensitive document a private company owns. We treat it that way - AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, per-tenant encryption keys, append-only audit log, GDPR-compliant. EU customers' data is hosted in Frankfurt; US in us-east. SOC 2 Type I attestation is in progress, with Type II following ~12 months later.

EU data stays in the EU (Frankfurt region). DPA available. One-click data export (you own your data). Account deletion triggers a 30-day grace period then full purge. Data subject access requests handled within 30 days. Privacy policy in plain English, not legalese.

UI is available in English, Dansk, Norsk, Svenska, and Deutsch. Language is independent of jurisdiction - a Danish founder running a UK Ltd. can use the Danish UI. Legal-grade exports stay in the jurisdiction's regulatory language (a Danish ejerbog is in Danish; a US capitalization table is in English) regardless of UI preference. French and Italian for Swiss customers are post-launch.

items.q: Can I import from Carta or another tool?
items.a: Yes. Export a CSV from Carta, Pulley, or any spreadsheet and paste into our bulk-add screen - columns auto-map. Or upload your formation documents and grant agreements; our AI will extract the entire cap table to a draft you confirm. Either path is typically a 5-minute migration.

cta.heading: See your cap table in 15 minutes.
cta.lede: No credit card. No sales call. No lawyer. Paste your existing spreadsheet, type it in plain English, or upload your formation docs.
cta.languages: Available in Dansk · Norsk · Svenska · Deutsch · English

compareCarta.competitorTagline: The market-leading US equity-management platform for venture-backed companies.
compareCarta.lede: Carta is the best-known cap table platform, built for venture-backed US scaleups. FreeCapT is built for everyone else - bootstrapped founders, family businesses, agencies, and small SaaS, in seven jurisdictions. Here is an honest, factual comparison.
compareCarta.bestForFreeCapT: Bootstrapped and early-stage founders, family businesses, agencies and small SaaS who want a real cap table for free, in their own jurisdiction and language, without a sales call.
compareCarta.bestForCompetitor: Venture-backed US startups and scaleups that need 409A valuations, fund administration, and the broad equity-management suite investors already expect.
compareCarta.whenCompetitor: If you are a US C-corp raising priced venture rounds and need integrated 409A valuations, fund administration, or features your investors specifically request, Carta's depth in that ecosystem is hard to match. We focus on the long tail Carta is not optimised for.

meta.title: About FreeCapT - built by Bifrost Studios in Copenhagen
meta.description: Why we built a free, multi-jurisdiction, AI-native cap table for founders and small businesses everywhere. Made by Bifrost Studios in Copenhagen.

about.title: A free cap table for the other 95%
about.lede: Most companies are not venture-backed unicorns. They are bootstrapped startups, family businesses, agencies, and small SaaS - and they deserve a cap table that is free, legible, and built for their country.
paragraphs: FreeCapT started with a simple frustration: the tools for tracking who owns a company are priced for venture-backed US scaleups, and they treat every other kind of business as an afterthought. If you run a Danish ApS, a German GmbH, or a UK Ltd., you either pay for software that does not understand your jurisdiction, or you keep your cap table in a spreadsheet and hope it stays correct.

We think that is backwards. The vast majority of private companies are not chasing a Series C. They are founders, families, and small teams who need to know - clearly and confidently - who owns what. So we built a cap table that is free for personal use, speaks five languages, understands seven jurisdictions, and uses AI to make setup take minutes instead of an afternoon with a lawyer.

We charge $15/month when you are ready to share with stakeholders, use AI beyond initial setup, or generate legal-grade documents. That is the whole business model. No per-seat creep, no usage cliffs, no sales calls.

values.title: Free should mean free
values.body: The personal cap table is free forever - unlimited stakeholders, no time limit, no credit card. You pay $15/month only when you want to share, use AI, or generate legal-grade documents.

values.title: Your country, your rules
values.body: Most tools are US-first and bolt the rest of the world on later. We build country packs - real instruments, registries, and tax schemes - for each jurisdiction we support.

values.title: Plain language over jargon
values.body: A cap table is the most important document a private company owns. It should be legible to the founder who owns it, not just the lawyer who drafted it.

values.title: Your data is yours
values.body: One-click export of everything. Magic-link sign-in, no passwords. GDPR-grade handling, EU and US regions. No third-party trackers.

about.whoBody: FreeCapT is built by <studio>Bifrost Studios</studio>, a small software studio in Copenhagen, Denmark. We are a focused team that cares about craft, privacy, and pricing that respects the people who use our products.

meta.title: Privacy policy - FreeCapT
meta.description: How FreeCapT collects, uses, and protects your data. GDPR-compliant, EU and US regions, no third-party trackers, one-click export and deletion.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data FreeCapT collects, why, and what you can do about it. FreeCapT is operated by Bifrost Studios ("we"), Copenhagen, Denmark. We are the data controller for your account data, and a data processor for the cap table content you store with us. We write this in plain English on purpose.
collectItems: Account data: your email address (used for magic-link sign-in) and basic profile and workspace settings.
Cap table content: the companies, stakeholders, securities, and transactions you create. You control this; we process it to provide the service.
Usage and diagnostics: minimal, privacy-respecting product analytics and error reports to keep the service working. Account identifiers are hashed in event payloads.
privacy.collectNote: We do not use Google Analytics, advertising trackers, or third-party session-replay tools that we do not control. We do not sell your data, ever.
privacy.whereBody: You choose your data region when you create a company. EU customers' data is hosted in the EU (Frankfurt); US customers in us-east. The region is fixed once a company is created. A small number of carefully chosen sub-processors (hosting, email delivery, AI inference, error tracking) support the service; each is bound by a data processing agreement and selected for EU data handling where applicable.
privacy.aiBody: When you use AI features (document extraction, plain-English bulk add, ask-your-cap-table), the relevant content is sent to our AI provider to generate a response, in your region where supported. We do not allow your content to be used to train third-party models.
privacy.legalBody: We process account and cap table data to perform our contract with you, usage and security data under our legitimate interest in keeping the service safe and reliable, and any optional communications with your consent. EU/UK data subjects have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection.
controlsItems: Export: one click exports everything - ledger, documents, and audit log - as a ZIP.
Deletion: deleting your account starts a 30-day grace period, then a full purge.
Requests: data subject access requests are handled within 30 days.
privacy.securityBody: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, per-tenant encryption keys, an append-only audit log, and magic-link authentication (no passwords). More detail is on our <link>security overview</link>.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use only the cookies required to keep you signed in and the service secure. We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
privacy.contactBody: For any privacy request or question, email <email>privacy@freecapt.com</email>. A Data Processing Agreement is available on request.
privacy.disclaimer: This policy is provided in good faith and in plain language. If anything here conflicts with your rights under applicable law, those rights prevail.

meta.title: Terms of service - FreeCapT
meta.description: The terms for using FreeCapT, the free cap table for founders and small businesses. Plain-English terms covering accounts, plans, your data, and acceptable use.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of FreeCapT, operated by Bifrost Studios ("we"), Copenhagen, Denmark. By creating an account you agree to them. We have kept them short and readable.
terms.s1Body: FreeCapT helps you record and model a company's capitalisation. It is a software tool, not a law firm, accountant, or tax adviser. Nothing in the product is legal, financial, or tax advice. For actual fundraises, tax elections, and statutory filings, consult a qualified professional.
terms.s2Body: You sign in with a magic link sent to your email - there are no passwords. You are responsible for keeping access to your email secure and for activity in your workspace. You must be old enough to form a binding contract in your jurisdiction.
s3Items: Free plan: the personal cap table is free, with no time limit and no stakeholder cap.

Paid plan ($15/month): unlocks sharing with stakeholders, AI features beyond initial setup, and legal-grade document generation. Billed in advance; cancel any time and your plan stays active until the end of the period.
Prices are shown exclusive of any applicable taxes (e.g. VAT), which are added where required.
terms.s4Body: You own the content you put into FreeCapT. You grant us the limited rights needed to host and process it to provide the service. You can export everything at any time, and deleting your account purges your data after a 30-day grace period. Our handling of personal data is described in the <link>privacy policy</link>.
s5Items: break the law or infringe others' rights using the service;
attempt to access data that is not yours, or probe our security without authorisation;
resell or white-label the service without our written agreement;
upload malware or interfere with the service's operation.
terms.s5Outro: Security researchers acting in good faith are welcome - see our responsible disclosure contact at <email>security@freecapt.com</email>.
terms.s6Body: We work hard to keep FreeCapT available and accurate, but the service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties. Planned and unplanned status is published at <link>freecapt.com/status</link>.
terms.s7Body: To the extent permitted by law, our total liability arising from the service is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months before the claim. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses. Nothing limits liability that cannot be limited by law.
terms.s8Body: We may update these terms; material changes will be notified by email or in-product. You can stop using and delete your account at any time. We may suspend or end access for serious or repeated breaches of these terms.
terms.s9Body: These terms are governed by the laws of Denmark, with the courts of Copenhagen having jurisdiction, except where mandatory local consumer law gives you other rights.
